text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 
144 
GAP_MO_COINS_2M 
LABEL: 
Gap Mail Order Pharmacy Coinsurance for 2-month supply 
DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the beneficiary co-insurance percentage for a 2 month supply of the drugs on 
this tier, using a standard mail order pharmacy during the coverage gap phase of the Part D benefit. 
SHORT NAME: —
LONG NAME: GAP_MO_COINS_2M 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
8 
SOURCE: 
CMS
